title: Questions from Quarantine: Summer, Sunlight, and COVID-19
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: This article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to address public inquiries related to the COVID-19 pandemic, offering advice on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global health crisis. A specific episode focuses on the implications of summer and sunlight on the virus. The format encourages audience participation through social media using a dedicated hashtag. The content is presented as part of the Security and Global Health Project, positioning it as an expert-led resource for navigating the pandemic's challenges.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为'隔离期问题'的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在回应公众对COVID-19大流行相关的疑问，就如何在全球健康危机期间保持身心健康提供建议。其中一期特别节目聚焦于夏季和阳光对病毒的影响。节目形式鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用特定标签进行互动提问。该内容隶属于'安全与全球健康项目'，旨在成为一个由专家主导的资源，帮助公众应对疫情带来的挑战。
